title: selaginella neospringiana
intro: Selaginella neospringiana, also known as Springiana or Spingana, is a type of ancient, living fossil plant that belongs to the Selaginellaceae family, a group of small, leathery, and highly adaptable plants. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Selaginella neospringiana include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially providing protection against oxidative stress and certain diseases. Selaginella neospringiana can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and extracts, which are often used to support overall well-being and promote healthy aging.
